name: Axe
description: Axe is all the reinforcement this army needs!

abilities.name: One Man Army
abilities.description: Grants Axe temporary based on Axe's current armor. Allied heroes venturing too close to Axe passively disables this effect linearly. Bestows this ability. However, the ability does not grant the created bonus because they cannot utilize by design.

abilities.name: Berserker's Call
abilities.description: Berserker's Call now applies Battle Hunger to affected units within the radius.

abilities.name: Battle Hunger
abilities.description: Enables the debuff applied to be stackable. Reapplying the debuff now creates an independent debuff instance.

abilities.name: Counter Helix
abilities.description: After a set number of incoming attacks, Axe performs a helix counter attack, dealing pure damage to all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Culling Blade
abilities.description: Axe spots a weakness and strikes, dealing pure damage. Grants permanent bonus armor per hero kill credited to Culling Blade, reseting its cooldown at the same time.
